testcase.name: test_health_endpoint_ok
testcase.system-err: --------------------------------- Captured Err --------------------------------- INFO:httpx:HTTP Request: GET http://testserver/health "HTTP/1.1 200 OK"

testcase.name: test_health_and_ready_endpoints
testcase.system-out: --------------------------------- Captured Log --------------------------------- INFO httpx:_client.py:1025 HTTP Request: GET http://testserver/health "HTTP/1.1 200 OK" ERROR src.data.interfaces.api:api.py:160 就绪检查失败: 'DataManager' object has no attribute 'is_initialized' INFO httpx:_client.py:1025 HTTP Request: GET http://testserver/ready "HTTP/1.1 503 Service Unavailable" --------------------------------- Captured Out ---------------------------------
testcase.system-err: --------------------------------- Captured Err --------------------------------- INFO:httpx:HTTP Request: GET http://testserver/health "HTTP/1.1 200 OK" ERROR:src.data.interfaces.api:就绪检查失败: 'DataManager' object has no attribute 'is_initialized' INFO:httpx:HTTP Request: GET http://testserver/ready "HTTP/1.1 503 Service Unavailable"

testcase.name: test_store_failure_path_returns_500
testcase.system-out: --------------------------------- Captured Log --------------------------------- INFO src.data.interfaces.api:api.py:254 开始存储数据，类型: database ERROR src.data.interfaces.api:api.py:272 数据存储失败: store failed INFO httpx:_client.py:1025 HTTP Request: POST http://testserver/api%20/%20v1%20/%20data%20/%20store "HTTP/1.1 500 Internal Server Error" --------------------------------- Captured Out ---------------------------------
testcase.system-err: --------------------------------- Captured Err --------------------------------- INFO:src.data.interfaces.api:开始存储数据，类型: database ERROR:src.data.interfaces.api:数据存储失败: store failed INFO:httpx:HTTP Request: POST http://testserver/api%20/%20v1%20/%20data%20/%20store "HTTP/1.1 500 Internal Server Error"

testcase.name: test_validate_endpoint_not_implemented_returns_503

testcase.name: test_ready_endpoint_exception_returns_503
testcase.system-out: --------------------------------- Captured Log --------------------------------- ERROR src.data.interfaces.api:api.py:160 就绪检查失败: boom INFO httpx:_client.py:1025 HTTP Request: GET http://testserver/ready "HTTP/1.1 503 Service Unavailable" --------------------------------- Captured Out ---------------------------------
